embed_and_upsert_text_records_into_a_pin: Embed and upsert text records into a Pinecone namespace using integrated embeddings.
fetch_specific_vectors_and_their_metadat: Fetch specific vectors and their metadata from a Pinecone namespace by ID.
generate_vector_embeddings_for_a_set_of_: Generate vector embeddings for a set of texts with a Pinecone-hosted embedding model.
integrate_pinecone_into_the_workflow_can: Integrate Pinecone into the workflow. Can generate embeddings, upsert text, search with text, fetch vectors, and search with vectors.
run_a_text_query_against_a_pinecone_inde: Run a text query against a Pinecone index with metadata filtering and optional reranking.
